text: I scheduled a picolaser treatment with Dana for some spots on my cheek and wasn’t seeing the results I wanted about a month later. Messaged Dana & she immediately booked me for a follow up appointment. During the appointment she assessed my skin and walked me through her recommendations to achieve better results. Now a few weeks out and the spots on my cheeks have dramatically improved! Thank you, Dana!!
author: Misty-Jade Carlson

text: DO NOT GO HERE. Save yourself the heartache. I got a terrible filler job done and they refused to refund me to get it done elsewhere. They took no accountability and they gave no apology. It is strictly about taking your money regardless of what they do to your face.
author: Kelly Longenecker

text: I’m literally so freaking happy! I had my first session with the Pico laser to remove my micro bladed eyebrows and they are basically gone! After the session with Dana, I looked in the mirror and just wanted to cry. Even with my brows swollen to the high heavens with redness and bleached hairs…I was stunned. I cannot recommend Clarity Skin enough. If you’re thinking about doing this service, just do it! I’ve only had one and I’m completely satisfied already. So thankful for Dana. She is amazing, so sweet and personable. Thank you! I’m so happy! Added a picture, top is no make up, two micro bladed sessions with one touch up each, last session was over 4 years ago. They are pretty faded, gray and saturated. Middle is 3 hours after my session and bottom was my micro bladed brows with make up. I’m so excited for a more natural look! :) thank you Dana and Clarity Skin!
author: Taylor Bernard

text: I had such a great experience at Clarity Skin Medical Spa. Jocelyn is fantastic at laser hair removal — she’s thorough, professional, and makes you feel completely comfortable through the whole process. Mitch did my V-Beam treatment and was just as amazing — super knowledgeable and explained everything so well. You can tell they really care about their clients and results. Highly recommend!
author: Laura Astle

text:
I had the best experience with Brooke for my lip filler and flip! From start to finish, the process was smoot and so professional. She took her time to make sure I was completely comfortable and happy with the results, and it really shows - my lips look exactly as I was hoping for. Brooke has such a gentle touch and a great eye for detail. I can’t recommend her enough!

On top of that, the staff at Clarity is so kind and helpful, and the entire office is clean and comfortable to be in.
author: Anna Tilley

text: They are incredible! I got my micro blading laser removed and the pigment is completely gone after just one session. I recommend coming here if you need laser removal!
author: Rachel Schultz
